name: Bug Tracker - Publish to Azure DevOps Backlog

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  prompt: 'Fix the following bug in the EVO IBE codebase:

Bug ID: ' + $('Bug Tracker Webhook').item.json.body.id + '
Title: ' + $('Bug Tracker Webhook').item.json.body.title + '
Severity: ' + $('Bug Tracker Webhook').item.json.body.severity + '
Page: ' + $('Bug Tracker Webhook').item.json.body.page + '
Device: ' + $('Bug Tracker Webhook').item.json.body.device + '
Category: ' + ($('Bug Tracker Webhook').item.json.body.category || 'N/A') + '
Description: ' + $('Bug Tracker Webhook').item.json.body.description + '

Backlog URL: ' + ($json._links && $json._links.html && $json._links.html.href || 'N/A')
}) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, workItemId: $('Create Azure DevOps Bug').item.json.id, url: $('Create Azure DevOps Bug').item.json._links && $('Create Azure DevOps Bug').item.json._links.html && $('Create Azure DevOps Bug').item.json._links.html.href || '', devin_session: $json.session_id || null }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, error: $json.message || 'Failed to create work item' }) }}
